security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://eu-assets.i.posthog.com https://*.posthog.com; connect-src 'self' https://eu.i.posthog.com https://*.posthog.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://rsms.me; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com https://rsms.me

bundle.shortDescription: An ambient focus timer that quietly carries your day.
bundle.longDescription: FocusLine draws a thin line at the edge of your screen that fills as your session passes. You feel time moving in your peripheral vision without breaking out of what you're doing.
